Simple GAN vs CTGAN — Comparison Report

Same MLP classifier and test set; only the synthetic augmentation method differs.

Simple GAN: MLP generator + discriminator (vanilla GAN) with residual skip + D-score quality gate.
CTGAN: Conditional Tabular GAN with mode-specific normalisation + Mahalanobis quality gate.
